reviews.name: places/ChIJ06uhGgC5lzMRo3_wUybhdaI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNJcDRpMF9nRRAB
reviews.text: Our go-to place to date ourselves once a month. It never fails to satisfy our cravings, it's reasonably priced, Hindi tinipid, quality is amazing! I'm really happy na malapit sila samin.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ06uhGgC5lzMRo3_wUybhdaI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQzbE1EUTNRRRAB
reviews.text:
This shop is a hidden gem! 👍🏻

Their serving is enough for at least 2 people. Real fruits are also being served with the waffles and crepes. Luckily, they also do delivery.

Hopefully, they will be available in grab to cater to wider customers.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ06uhGgC5lzMRo3_wUybhdaI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tNdGEyZ3dTM2xGZVhvelpYZEROVzF6TTB3eWEwRRAB
reviews.text: Fruits and other toppings are fresh. I love the texture and consistency of the crepe overall

reviews.name: places/ChIJ06uhGgC5lzMRo3_wUybhdaI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pWb09VVllNVTlqYVRjd05ERkdPWE53ZERkVWNYYxAB
reviews.text:
This place is hands down our go-to spot and honestly, the standard in Vista Verde Executive Village. Whether it’s a random weekday meal or a casual get-together, it never disappoints.

The food? Absolutely outstanding. Flavorful, comforting, and always hits the spot. And the best part? The prices are super affordable. It’s rare to find a place where you get both quality and value, but this one nails it every time.

We’ve lost count of how many times we’ve eaten here, and it’s always consistent. Great food, friendly vibe, and reliable service. If you’re in the area and haven’t tried it yet, you’re seriously missing out.

Wishful thinking: I hope they'll add steak in their menu.

Local gem, no doubt. 💯

reviews.name: places/ChIJ06uhGgC5lzMRo3_wUybhdaI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURUbTVESW1RRRAB
reviews.text:
Hope you don't mind that I added you to Google Maps. Everyone deserves to know this place!

Small neighborhood cafe that serves all-day breakfast, smoothies, coffee, pancakes, crepes, and waffles. This was quite a surprise! Very affordable crepes. Siksik and di tinipid. What you see in the photos is what you will get. Maybe even better! Brewed coffee was good too and they served it with actual milk and not powdered creamer. Already shared you with my neighbors. Too good to keep a secret! Will def return soon!
